name_cn:
Grade A
New Arrival🅰️🅰️
CELINE New Arrival. TRIOMPHE CANVAS logo print
Flip top with decorative TRIOMPHE lock, snap closure, one main compartment, one flat pocket, detachable chain strap, and adjustable leather shoulder strap. Multiple carrying styles. Daily essentials like phone, lipstick, and keys fit easily. Three-in-one design, definitely a popular choice 🫶🏻 Perfect for all occasions!
Style No.: 10L972 Material/Beige Brown
Size: 20.5x11x4 (with original packaging)
